content.en:
After coming to Fengya Island.

Ye Tian began to retreat, and he was going to use this Abyss Fruit on the other side to help him break the shackles of the Origin Rules on the other side.

In order to be able to ensure that he broke through 100%, he once again built an Eternal Ruins Divine Array.

Subsequently.

He entered the Eternal Ruins Divine Array, and let the Eternal Ruins Divine Array send himself into the Origin of the Land on the Other Side of Eternity.

Grunt.

Ye Tian swallowed the Abyss Fruit on the other side in one gulp, and the endless energy poured into his Origin Will, making his comprehension reach an unimaginable level, and the Origin Will seemed to penetrate the inside of the Origin of the Eternal Shore, and felt a wisp of rule aura at the core.

Gradually, he realized the higher-level origin rules of the other side, and the shackles began to loosen.

......

The battle for the Abyssal Fruit on the other side is over at this moment, this time there is no Origin Upper Realm falling, and no Origin Middle Realm has passed, but several Origin Upper Realm have been hit hard.

And.

The Lord of the Bloody Night snatched ten Abyssal Fruits from the other side, angering the forces on the Origin Black River.

Even Wind Tooth Island is very unhappy with the Lord of the Blood Night.

Before, Wind Tooth Island and the Lord of the Blood Night still cooperated, but now, the Lord of the Blood Night has done something a little inauthentic.

Of course, the forces on the Origin Black River did not stop there, they would definitely find trouble with the Lord of the Blood Night and the Xiao family, and if the Lord of the Blood Night did not spit out some benefits, they would still not give up.

Wind Tooth Island.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth and the Lord of the Cave came back and called the Lord of the White Capital.

"Lord of the White Capital, these are three Abyss Fruits on the other side, we can only snatch three, you take it to cultivate, and strive to break through the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to the ninety out of two realms, and then go to the Origin Upper Realm. The Lord of the Wind Teeth said.

"Thank you to the Lord of Wind Tooth Island and the Lord of the Cave ......"

The Lord of the White Capital said excitedly.

If it weren't for the help of the Lord of the Wind Fangs, he would not be qualified to attack the Origin Upper Realm now.

Of course, he is also qualified enough, and he has also made a lot of contributions to Fengya Island, so he enjoys such treatment.

Like the Lord of Qingyun, they have shallow qualifications, so they naturally don't have such treatment.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the White Capital took these three Abyss Fruits from the other side and went back to cultivation and retreat.

Some time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally used this abyss fruit on the other side to successfully raise the origin rules of the other side to the eighty percent realm, and the origin of the other side was improved by a bit, and his strength improved a lot.

After the other side of the origin rules broke through to the eighty percent realm, although it was difficult for the heat to continue to progress, but by relying on long years of hard work, he was still able to improve the realm of the other side's origin rules little by little.

It's been another time.

The Lord of the White Capital finally used the three Abyss Fruits on the other side to raise the origin rules of the other side to the realm of ninety out of two.

Subsequently, he made a lot of preparations and began to attack the Origin Realm.

For this reason, the Lord of the Wind Teeth and others are all paying attention to the breakthrough of the Lord of the White Capital.

However, as the long years passed, the breakthrough vision of the Lord of the White Capital did not come.

At this time, they already had a guess in their minds.

The lord of the white capital should have failed to break through.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for the Lord of the White Capital to get out of the customs.

"Lord of the Wind Fangs, I failed to break through!"

The lord of the white capital said helplessly.

This breakthrough failed, his body was not lightly injured, and it would take a long time to recover, and he would not be able to impact the Origin Ascending Realm again for a long time.

"It's okay, the probability of wanting to break through to the Origin Upper Realm is very low, this breakthrough fails, there will be a next time!" said the Lord of Wind Fangs.

But in fact, the Lord of Wind Teeth was still a little disappointed.

After all, they are still quite looking forward to the Lord of the White Capital, and they also hope that the Lord of the White Capital will break through successfully.

In that case, there will be five Origin Ascendants on Wind Tooth Island, which will also make Wind Tooth Island's reputation soar and become an even more powerful force.

It's a pity that the breakthrough of the Lord of the White Capital failed!

......

In the following years, Ye Tian's strength improved slowly.

He wanted to continue to improve quickly, which he couldn't.

However, his strength improvement was still extremely fast compared to other Origin Realms.

When his strength was improving slowly, Ye Tian mainly cultivated the human race, as well as cultivating his son Ye Xingchen.

He mainly wanted to train his son to the other side of the world, and he now had a lot of inheritance knowledge and resources and treasures, and he lacked nothing.

Under his full cultivation, Ye Xingchen finally became a genius on the other side on this day.

After that, Ye Xingchen used the various resources given by Ye Tian, and his cultivation strength was rapidly improving.

And the number of Terran Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors is also getting faster and faster, especially the number of Terrans with more than seven Bone Transformation Realms has increased.

Gradually, the territorial sea boundary has grown to a world second only to the Taidu realm.

Moreover, the strength and fame of the human race gradually spread.

Due to Ye Tian's existence, other forces did not dare to be enemies of the Terrans, causing the Terrans to become more and more powerful.

For this situation, Ye Tian was naturally very pleased.

In order to better manage some of the powerhouses of the Terran Race, Ye Tian also built a force in the Land of Blood Yan - the Terran Sacred Pavilion, and any Terran Bone Transformation Realm must register in the Terran Sacred Pavilion to become a celebrity.

At this point, the Terran Sacred Pavilion has also become one of the five top forces in the Blood Yan Domain, second only to Gu Heng Mountain, Gu Demon Sea and other forces.

Ye Tian's plan was for the Terran and the Terran Holy Pavilion to continue to grow, and his strength would slowly increase, so he would slowly spend a long time.

However, on this day, something happened to the Terran Sacred Pavilion, or something happened to the Bloody Domain.

......

Terran Sanctuary.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came here, and a high-ranking Terran gathered here.

"Ancestor, many of our Terran Sacred Pavilion have disappeared silently recently, and we can only confirm death, but how to die is not clear. An eight-time bone transformation realm Terran high-level said.

"How many bone metamorphosis have died?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Fifty-six bone transformation realms, and all of them are more than six bone transformation realms!"

They reported.

This number made Ye Tian angry, the number of Terran powerhouses above the sixth bone transformation realm is not too much, and now dozens have fallen, this is not a small number!

Subsequently.

He went to investigate to see which force had attacked the Terrans.

However, he only investigated, but found that not only the Terran Holy Pavilion, but also the forces such as Gu Heng Mountain, Taidu Realm, and Gu Demon Sea had also lost a large number of bone transformation realms, and many of them were primeval-level geniuses.

Moreover, on this day, a piece of news came that shocked him.

The Lord of the True Extreme, the other side of the Ancient Demon Sea, had fallen, this was a other shore-level genius, and as a result, he was killed silently, which caused the wrath of the Ancient Demon Sea.

Thereupon.

One of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Blood Yan Domain gathered together to discuss this matter.

Ye Tian's copy body was also involved, and he also wanted to know what was going on. ~
